privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic 3x3 wind turbine grid scenario in the Bridge Command ship simulator. The grid uses 0.5 nautical mile spacing (verified from task description) and contains 9 static turbines and 1 moving guard vessel (verified). The claimed grid center at 50.700°N, -1.000°W is located in the general Solent area but approximately 5-6 nautical miles from the actual geographic center of the Solent (50.7853°N, -1.2903°W). The grid offset calculations are mathematically sound, using correct maritime coordinate conversions (1° latitude = 60 nm; 1° longitude = 60*cos(latitude) nm). The haversine distance formula in the verifier correctly uses Earth radius of 3440.065 nautical miles (6371 km / 1.852 km per nm). Bridge Command is a real, open-source ship simulator available on GitHub.
